phrases.english: Past is past, let it go.

phrases.indonesian: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.
phrases.transliteration: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.

phrases.english: Discover new cultures, connect with people.
phrases.indonesian: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.
phrases.transliteration: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.

phrases.english: Understand the language, feel the spirit.
Learn a little, grow a lot.
Embrace the challenge, you will win.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.
phrases.transliteration: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.

phrases.english: Good things, come to those who wait.
phrases.indonesian: Hal baik, datang pada yang sabar.
phrases.transliteration: Hal baiik, daatang pada yang sabar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.

phrases.indonesian: Pikir di luar, bangun di dalam.
phrases.transliteration: Pi-kir di lu-ar, ba-ngun di da-lam.

phrases.english: You're a true friend, always there.
I miss our talks, a lot.
I want to buy this one.
Read Indonesian books, expand your mind.
Make Indonesian friends, share your story.
Embrace the challenge, achieve your goals.
Enjoy the journey, reach your goal.
A little more, and we're there.
Enjoy the journey, not just the end.
Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
I want to go, to the beach.
Believe in yourself, you can do it.
A kind heart, shines so bright.

phrases.indonesian: Sebarkan kasih sayang, bagai mentari hangat.
phrases.transliteration: seb-ar-kan ka-sih sa-yang, ba-gai men-ta-ri ha-ngat.

phrases.english: A cat naps, on a warm mat.
phrases.indonesian: Kucing tidur, di atas tikar hangat.
phrases.transliteration: Koo-ching tee-door, dee ah-tahs tee-kar hahng-gaht.

phrases.english: The dog barks, at the passing car.
Birds sing, in the morning light.
A fish swims, in the clear water.
Monkeys chatter, high in the trees.
